description: Tool returns empty or null values for channels with insufficient samples
symptom: get_channel_statistics returns null for valid channel_id
likely_cause: Channel has fewer samples than required for computation
fix: Ensure tool returns partial results (e.g., sample_count, mean) even if full analysis is unavailable

description: Historical query returns frames outside requested time range
symptom: start_time_ms and end_time_ms filters are ignored
likely_cause: Historical buffer does not filter by timestamp
fix: Add timestamp filtering to history buffer access
